summary: Implement Phase 2C Emission -> CID Promotion Governor in LCS with deterministic single-row and batch promotion functions, row locking, registry/status validation, CID intake insertion + fn_process_cid handoff, strict failure logging to lcs.lcs_errors, ingest_status reject/promote transitions, and enforcement tests.

payload.objective: Deterministically promote validated emissions into CID intake and advance LCS state.

classification.rationale: Feature work within LCS execution surfaces. Adds promotion functions and enforcement without modifying protected CTB backbone, altitude hierarchy, doctrine, or constitutional assets.

constraints: DB functions/triggers/permissions implemented via migrations under migrations/
No changes outside allowed paths without a new WORK_PACKET

functions.name: lcs.fn_promote_emission
requirements: SELECT ... FOR UPDATE the emission row
Insert into lcs.cid_intake with pass-through sovereign_id, outreach_id, movement_type_code, payload
On ANY failure: insert deterministic row into lcs.lcs_errors, set ingest_status = REJECTED, write reject_reason
Execute within a single transaction boundary

functions.name: lcs.fn_promote_emission_batch
requirements: Select deterministic ordered emissions ORDER BY emitted_at ASC

enforcement: No direct INSERT into cid_intake by any sub-hub
Only promotion function may mint CID
No emission may transition from PROMOTED to RECEIVED

builder_outputs_expected: Migration SQL for promotion functions and supporting DB enforcement
Permission/grant SQL enforcing no direct cid_intake inserts by sub-hubs
Trigger/guard updates if required for status-transition enforcement

include: fn_promote_emission success path: row lock, status RECEIVED validation, registry validation, cid_intake insert, fn_process_cid handoff, status PROMOTED
fn_promote_emission rejects invalid ingest_status and logs deterministic lcs.lcs_errors row
fn_promote_emission rejects missing/invalid movement_type_code and logs deterministic lcs.lcs_errors row
On any failure ingest_status becomes REJECTED and reject_reason is written
fn_promote_emission_batch uses deterministic ORDER BY emitted_at ASC
fn_promote_emission_batch respects p_limit and returns promoted count
No silent skip logic in batch path
Sub-hub cannot directly INSERT into lcs.cid_intake (where testable)
PROMOTED -> RECEIVED transition is blocked (where enforced/testable)
Append-only enforcement remains intact after promotion changes

acceptance_criteria: lcs.fn_promote_emission(p_emission_id uuid) exists and enforces deterministic single-row promotion flow
Function locks the target emission row and validates RECEIVED status plus registry membership before promotion
Successful promotion inserts into lcs.cid_intake and calls lcs.fn_process_cid(new_cid_uuid)
Any failure logs deterministic error to lcs.lcs_errors, sets ingest_status = REJECTED, and writes reject_reason
lcs.fn_promote_emission_batch(p_limit int) exists, orders by emitted_at ASC, stops at p_limit, and returns count promoted
No direct cid_intake inserts by sub-hubs
Tests exist and cover single-row flow, batch flow, and enforcement rules
